scenarios.title: Connect Four: complete the bottom-row four
scenarios.prompt: Red to move. Return the column index that wins immediately for red.

expectedActions.label: Column 4
expectedActions.note: Drop in column 4 to make four.

scenarios.title: Connect Four: block the bottom-row threat

expectedActions.label: Column 4
expectedActions.note: Block red's immediate four.

scenarios.title: Connect Four: build an open-ended three
scenarios.prompt: Red to move. Return the column index that creates two bottom-row threats.

expectedActions.label: Column 4
expectedActions.note: Create red threats on both column 1 and column 5.

scenarios.title: Connect Four: avoid allowing a vertical loss
scenarios.prompt: Red to move. Yellow has a vertical threat; return the only safe blocking column index.

expectedActions.label: Column 5
expectedActions.note: Occupy column 5 before yellow completes the vertical four.
